description_long: This is a compact, open-frame utility trailer with a rectangular metal cage structure on top and a slatted metal platform for carrying cargo. The trailer is supported by four robust wheels, two on each side, and features a sturdy, industrial-style chassis made of what appears to be steel or iron. The rear of the trailer has two red reflectors or lights, indicating its use for road transport. The open design allows for easy loading and unloading of goods, while the metal bars provide containment and security for items in transit. The trailer's construction suggests it is designed for durability and heavy-duty use in urban or industrial environments.
description: A small, open-frame utility trailer with a metal cage and slatted platform, supported by four wheels and rear reflectors. Its robust build is suited for transporting goods in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open metal cage, slatted platform, and rear reflectors.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the metal cage, platform, and two visible wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open cage, slatted platform, and the structure of the chassis.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the metal cage, platform, and two wheels visible.
